scope: Tiered-memory per-type dispatch (navigate_locate_dispatch, navigate_expand_typed, apply_selective_embedding_policy) + recall_fast() HNSW-only vector recall + MCP recall fast-by-default (deep=True opt-in for recall_hybrid). Closes #81: role_filter / project_id_filter / exclude_dag_id verified in published MCP wheel (wired in cdc1524b).
justification: No changes to recall_hybrid() SQL scoring, RRF formula, HNSW candidate selection, or BM25 path. New functions: navigate_locate_dispatch (routes by content_type), navigate_expand_typed (typed dereference), apply_selective_embedding_policy (embedding=NULL for non-semantic types), recall_fast (HNSW ORDER BY <=> LIMIT k only — no BM25/graph/RRF). MCP server bumped 0.9.7→0.9.8: recall() default path is recall_fast(); deep=True uses recall_hybrid(). All 18 unit tests pass (test_server.py). All 9 smoke tests pass (test_mcp_smoke.py). Zero scoring/ranking impact on existing recall_hybrid() path.
schema_change_detail: New function: pgmnemo.recall_fast(vector, INT, TEXT, INT, TEXT) — HNSW-only vector recall, 12-column return shape matching recall_lessons(). New indexes: ix_pgmnemo_lesson_tsv_entity (GIN, entity content_type), ix_pgmnemo_content_type_active (btree, content_type WHERE is_active), ix_pgmnemo_temporal_content_type (btree, t_valid_from WHERE content_type=temporal). New functions: navigate_locate_dispatch, navigate_expand_typed, apply_selective_embedding_policy (from tiered-dispatch phase).
scoring_impact: none — recall_fast is a new function; does not modify recall_hybrid or recall_lessons
recall_ranking_impact: none for deep=True (recall_hybrid unchanged); recall_fast is pure HNSW cosine (different function, different results by design)
issue_81_evidence: role_filter, project_id_filter, exclude_dag_id present in recall() signature since cdc1524b (v0.9.7). Verified by test_recall_exposes_filter_params in tests/test_mcp_smoke.py. deep param added in v0.9.8.
verification: pytest pgmnemo_mcp/tests/test_server.py: 18/18 passed. pytest tests/test_mcp_smoke.py: 9/9 passed. recall() inspect.signature confirms role_filter, project_id_filter, exclude_dag_id, deep all present with correct defaults.
